jobs.name: Daily Status Check
jobs.message: Run a brief daily status check. Post a short summary to Discord channel <YOUR_CHANNEL_ID> using: node /path/to/scripts/discord-post.js <YOUR_CHANNEL_ID> "<message>". Reply HEARTBEAT_OK when done.

jobs.name: Weekly Summary
jobs.message: Write a brief weekly summary based on memory/active-threads.md and recent daily notes. Post to Discord channel <YOUR_CHANNEL_ID>. Reply HEARTBEAT_OK when done.
